changelog: 1.0.0 - Initial release: formatting, branch protection, validation
1.1.0 - Added type checking, logging, lint-on-save, cross-platform support
1.2.0 - Added venv-aware Python tool execution with auto-create via uv
1.3.0 - Modular lib structure, orchestrator + domain agents architecture
1.4.0 - Git workflow integration: auto-branch, phase commits, rollback, PR finalization
2.0.0 - Replace v1.4 Node inline hooks with v2.0 Python shim (Phase D6). Registers 12 Python hooks under hooks/ against 8 CC events. Invocation: uv run python -m hooks.<name>.

SessionStart.description: Restore session state, inject additionalContext, audit .gitignore for critical patterns, stamp .language_profile.json from config/profiles/*.json detection, and check the marketplace clone for plugin updates (24h cache)

Stop.description: Refuse Stop when the working tree has uncommitted changes; remediation is commit or [WIP] commit

StopFailure.description: Record a ULID-keyed incident when CC fires a StopFailure (never blocks)

SessionEnd.description: Persist session state to memory dir on session end

PreCompact.description: Snapshot session state before CC compacts the transcript

PostCompact.description: Verify snapshot exists and drop stale .context_pct cache after compaction

UserPromptSubmit.description: Auto-cut feature branch on protected HEAD, gate on context budget, and update session-state ## Current Phase from prompt-text phase tokens

PreToolUse.description: Block edits on protected branches, writes containing known secret patterns, and mutating tool use by read/reason tier subagents

Block Bash commands matching destructive patterns, restrict read/reason-tier subagents to a read-only allowlist, block subagent Bash when session-state has not checkpointed in 30 min, gate commits on validation stamps, and scan staged diffs for secrets

PermissionDenied.description: Record a ULID-keyed incident when CC fires PermissionDenied (never blocks)

SubagentStart.description: Emit telemetry naming the subagent and its registry-declared maxTurns budget; consumed by Phase 4 quality scorer

InstructionsLoaded.description: Emit telemetry naming which CLAUDE.md / rules files CC loaded; consumed by Phase 4 quality scorer

TaskCreated.description: Bridge a CC TaskCreated event into the session-state Task Progress section

TaskCompleted.description: Flip the matching - [ ] line in session-state Task Progress to - [x] when CC fires TaskCompleted

FileChanged.description: Re-validate config/graph-registry.json and config/profiles/*.json against their schemas; advisory only

CwdChanged.description: Force-refresh the .language_profile.json stamp when CC reports a cwd shift (monorepo navigation)

ConfigChange.description: Invalidate on-disk caches (language-profile stamp, version-check state) when watched config files change

PostToolUse.description: Run profile-driven linter and formatter, enforce doc size limits on markdown files, auto-checkpoint session state, sweep orphaned tmpclaude-* files, log every edited file path
Append failed tool invocations to the rolling error log
